proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Point2[Real]) { (0 <= x0 and x1.norm_sq = x0 * x0) = point2_real_length_witness_57(x1, x0) }(side_a, c - b)
function(x0: Real, x1: Point2[Real]) { (0 <= x0 and x1.norm_sq = x0 * x0) = point2_real_length_witness_57(x1, x0) }(side_b, c - a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Point2[Real]) { (0 <= x0 and x1.norm_sq = x0 * x0) = point2_real_length_witness_57(x1, x0) }(side_c, b - a)

goal: heron_linear_product(side_a, side_b, side_c) = (a.triangle_area2(b, c) + a.triangle_area2(b, c)) * (a.triangle_area2(b, c) + a.triangle_area2(b, c))
